name: this-is-your-brain-on-food
description: Dr. Uma Naidoo's nutritional psychiatry guide — how food affects depression, anxiety, PTSD, ADHD, OCD, dementia, insomnia, and bipolar disorder.
useCase: Understand how food affects mental health and use targeted nutrition to support specific conditions.
knownRisks: Not a substitute for professional medical treatment
Individual responses to dietary changes vary
Some supplements can interact with medications
